testcase.name: test_multichip_sharded_residual_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/allocator/bank_manager.cpp:462: false info: Out of Memory: Not enough space to allocate 1835008 B L1 buffer across 4 banks, where each bank needs to store 458752 B, but bank size is 1461504 B (allocated: 1011968 B, free: 449536 B, largest free block: 381952 B) backtrace: --- testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x7b694a7120c0>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_sharded_residual_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """Measure a coherent two-layer sharded-residual decode family."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_RESIDUAL_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in RESIDUAL_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_RESIDUAL_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(RESIDUAL_CANDIDATES)}") config = _config() state = _real_state() ccl = get_tt_ccl(mesh_device) control = MultiChipDecoder.from_state_dict( state, hf_config=config, layer_idx=LAYER_IDX, mesh_device=mesh_device, batch=1, max_cache_len=MAX_CACHE_LEN, tt_ccl=ccl, ) candidate = MultiChipDecoder.from_state_dict( state, hf_config=config, layer_idx=LAYER_IDX, mesh_device=mesh_device, batch=1, max_cache_len=MAX_CACHE_LEN, multichip_config=replace(MultiChipConfig(), **RESIDUAL_CANDIDATES[candidate_id]), tt_ccl=ccl, ) host = torch.randn( (1, 1, 1, config.hidden_size), generator=torch.Generator().manual_seed(7211), dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) control_input = _mesh_input(host, mesh_device) candidate_input = _mesh_sharded_residual_input(host, mesh_device) control_key_0, control_value_0 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1) control_key_1, control_value_1 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1) candidate_key_0, candidate_value_0 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1) candidate_key_1, candidate_value_1 = _mesh_contiguous_caches(config, mesh_device, batch=1)
control_layer_0 = control.decode_forward(control_input, control_key_0, control_value_0, current_pos=7) control_layer_1 = control.decode_forward(control_layer_0, control_key_1, control_value_1, current_pos=7) > candidate_layer_0 = candidate.decode_forward( candidate_input, candidate_key_0, candidate_value_0, current_pos=7 )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:959: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2263: in decode_forward return self._decode_forward_device_position( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:2209: in _decode_forward_device_position hidden_states = self._mlp_decode_flat(hidden_states) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1880: in _mlp_decode_flat down = self._all_gather_matmul_flat( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1737: in _all_gather_matmul_flat gathered, output = ttnn.experimental.all_gather_matmul_async( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.experimental.all_gather_matmul_async', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.experimental.ccl_experimental.all_gather_matmul_async_t object at 0x7b694ecf4770>, preprocess_golden_function_inputs=None, golden_function=None, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=None, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 1.6968e-02, 3.4180e-02, ..., -1.6602e-02, -8.9722e-03]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 7168]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 7.4768e-03, -2.0996e-02, ..., 7.8125e-03, -6.2561e-03]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 7168]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE), device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-0.0039, -0.0156, ..., -0.0117, 0.0234], [-0.0117, 0.0039, ..., -0.0137, 0.0117], ..., [ 0.0039, 0.0039, ..., 0.0000, -0.0078], [ 0.0078, 0.0039, ..., 0.0078, -0.0078]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 28672, 2048]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 1]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 0.0078, 0.0000, ..., -0.0273, 0.0078], [ 0.0156, 0.0039, ..., 0.0156, 0.0078], ..., [-0.0195, -0.0156, ..., -0.0078, 0.0000], [-0.0039, 0.0039, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 28672, 2048]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 1, MeshCoordinate([0, 2]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.3438e-02, -2.3438e-02, ..., 0.0000e+00, -1.9531e-02], [ 1.9531e-02, -1.5625e-02, ..., -3.9062e-03, -1.1719e-02], ..., [-1.5625e-02, 1.5625e-02, ..., 0.0000e+00, 7.8125e-03], [ 0.0000e+00, 0.0000e+00, ..., 7.8125e-03, 7.8125e-03]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 28672, 2048]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 0, MeshCoordinate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0117, 0.0078], [-0.0234, 0.0039, ..., -0.0195, 0.0000], ..., [ 0.0078, -0.0117, ..., -0.0039, 0.0039], [-0.0156, 0.0000, ..., 0.0156, 0.0000]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 28672, 2048]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'all_gather_core_grid_offset': (0, 4), 'barrier_semaphore': <ttnn._ttnn.global_semaphore.global_semaphore object at 0x7b694b82f2d0>, 'chunks_per_sync': 10, 'compute_kernel_config': <ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.WormholeComputeKernelConfig object at 0x7b69481c8690>, ...} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_FATAL @
